author: Tharusha Madushan
text:
Today, I called this number to buy a 17 Pro Max. Before coming, I asked all the details including the price and whether the phone was in stock. I asked twice if I could purchase it today if I came to the shop.

The person I spoke to clearly confirmed that the X/A version in orange colour was available. They also confirmed the price as 4.30 lakhs.

After confirming everything, I went to the shop around 11 AM, dropping some of my important work, because I trusted the name Rifkhan’s iDealz.

However, only after I arrived, they checked the stock and told me that the phone was not available. This is completely unacceptable. I did not go there to waste my time based on false information.

Is it fair for staff to mislead customers like this and make them come all the way for nothing? I was extremely disappointed and frustrated.

I do not recommend the Bambalapitiya branch at all. The staff there are not reliable. I don’t know about the other branches, but what happened here was a very unpleasant experience.

If the management is seeing this, please ensure that customers’ valuable time is not wasted by giving false information.

Completely disappointed.
owner_reply:
Response from the owner 2 weeks ago
Dear Tharusha,

We would like to clarify a few points to avoid any misunderstanding. During the phone conversation, there was no confirmation that you would be visiting the showroom immediately to purchase the device. The inquiry mainly related to pricing and trade-in value for your existing iPhone.At the time, the iPhone 17 Pro Max X/A SIM version in Orange was discussed, and when you visited iDeal Prime branch, that specific variant was unavailable. However, this was clearly communicated at the showroom, and our team offered you the eSIM version, which was available at a more budget-friendly price.Additionally, our staff informed you that the requested X/A SIM version could be arranged within approximately two days, with the understanding that the price may vary depending on availability.We strive to be transparent with our customers and do not intentionally provide misleading information. Nevertheless, we regret the inconvenience caused and appreciate your feedback, as it helps us improve communication and service clarity.

Team iDealz

author: Ananthraj Rajendran
text:
Do not buy Green Lion tempered glass.
20 days ago, I purchased the Green Lion 4-in-1 Defender Pack for my iPhone 17 Pro for 10,000/=. Initially, the price they said was 15,000/= but after I mentioned that their Liberty Plaza store was said it for 10,000/=, they agreed to match the price.

The main issue is the poor quality of the tempered glass included in the package. A very minor impact like a small key accidentally dropping on the screen caused the tempered glass to shatter. Idealz is charging premium prices for very low quality accessories, which is unfair and disappointing. I would not recommend green lion tempered glass based on my experience.

For those who wants to protect their new iphone I strongly recommend to go for ESR products which is available from Future world and Xclusive.

author: Nimasha Sewwandi
text:
My Honest Experience at Idealz Lanka - Marina Mall

I recently visited the Idealz Lanka store at Marina Mall to purchase a phone, and the sales representative Abdul Rahman was very approachable and helpful.

I purchased my Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra for LKR 271,240. However I experienced strong pressure to buy additional accessories. Initially Abdul Rahman quoted LKR 30,000 for a tempered glass screen protector, wireless earbuds, a phone back cover, and a charging adapter. When I declined he reduced the price to LKR 20,000 for just the tempered glass, earbuds, and charger.

While I appreciated Abdul Rahman's assistance, I would advise future customers to be cautious. There seems to be a push to upsell accessories at inflated prices, which can feel uncomfortable. If you're only looking to buy a phone, be firm in your decision and consider checking prices elsewhere before purchasing accessories from this store.
